description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled toaster with a glossy, deep red metallic body and a black base. The toaster features two wide, parallel toast slots on the top, each with visible internal grates for holding bread. The front side has a metallic lever for lowering bread into the slots, while the rear side displays a diamond-shaped 'WESCO' logo in white. The toaster's surface is highly reflective, giving it a polished, sleek appearance. No visible control knobs or dials are present, and the power cord is not visible in any view. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external features aside from the lever and logo.
description: A glossy red, retro-style toaster with two top slots, a metallic lever, and a prominent 'WESCO' logo on the back. The design is sleek and minimalistic, with a highly reflective finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic lever and the two toast slots on top, with the glossy red body and black base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the white 'WESCO' logo centered on the curved red surface, with no visible controls or levers.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, highlighting the toast slots and lever, with the reflective red finish prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to view 1, showing the 'WESCO' logo and a side lever, with the toaster's curved shape and black base.
attribute_brand_logo: A white diamond-shaped 'WESCO' logo is visible on the rear curved surface of the toaster.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, parallel toast slots on the top, rectangular in shape, spaced evenly with visible internal grates.
